headline: Visa’s Flexible Credential Pilot Could Be A Game Changer For Visa (V)
summary: Visa, Zilch and Thredd recently introduced Visa Flexible Credential on Zilch cards in the UK, allowing multiple payment options to operate behind a single physical or digital card while preserving the usual tap-to-pay experience. This move highlights how Visa is turning its vast merchant acceptance network into a more configurable platform, giving issuers and fintechs a way to bundle different ways to pay without adding extra cards or apps for consumers. Next, we’ll examine how Visa Flexible...

headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Visa (V): Should You Buy?
